notes: v0.13.4 — UI bug fixes: BACK button in PLAY sub-pages now clickable (centred title was eating clicks); BOSS RUSH difficulty buttons fit cleanly (3-col → 1.4-stretch + VBox right column); first-clear rewards show a green check chip instead of strikethrough; SETTINGS row gets bell gradient + cyan stripe + corner brackets instead of flat dimming; crosshair preview now scales up to 4.00× to match the slider. Windows only.
